implementation_summary: Pinned Unity 6.3 LTS editor 6000.3.19f1 at changeset 7689f4515d75 and documented the minimal Windows installation, verification, exclusion, and upgrade-isolation policy.

files_changed.change: Declared the exact editor version and changeset.
Recorded the editor decision, Windows modules and prerequisites, supported host, install verification, scope exclusions, and isolated upgrade procedure.

verification.command: Parse ProjectSettings/ProjectVersion.txt and require one exact m_EditorVersion plus the matching changeset.
Search the repository for ProjectVersion.txt declarations.
Verify the release, LTS support line, component name, and changeset against official Unity documentation.
verification.output: Unity 6.3 LTS; 6000.3.19f1 released 2026-07-01; changeset 7689f4515d75; Windows Build Support (IL2CPP) is available.

verification.command: Open the repository through Unity Hub with the pinned editor and confirm no migration.
verification.output: Unity Hub is installed, but the exact editor is not installed locally and UF-002 has not yet supplied the package lock. The first full import is deferred until UF-002 to avoid generating unowned or floating package state.

proof.summary: Exact Unity editor version and changeset declaration.
Human-readable baseline and Windows module record.
Human review is required before UF-001 is accepted; full editor import will be performed with the UF-002 package lock.

notes: The product-file implementation is complete. The manual no-migration import is deliberately deferred to the first locked package resolution to respect UF-001 file ownership and avoid floating package state.
